1	apiVersion: batch/v1
2	kind: Job
3	metadata:
4	  name: spark-skew-baseline
5	  namespace: spark-skew
6	spec:
7	  backoffLimit: 0
8	  template:
9	    metadata:
10	      labels:
11	        app: spark-skew
12	        strategy: baseline
13	    spec:
14	      serviceAccountName: spark
15	      restartPolicy: Never
16	      containers:
17	      - name: spark-skew
18	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
19	        env:
20	        - name: STRATEGY
21	          value: "baseline"
22	        command:
23	        - /bin/bash
24	        - -c
25	        - |
26	          set -e
27	          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
28	          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
29	          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
30	          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
31	            --master local[2] \
32	            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
33	            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
34	          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
35	        resources:
36	          requests:
37	            cpu: 200m
38	            memory: 256Mi
39	          limits:
40	            cpu: 500m
41	            memory: 512Mi
42

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "baseline"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "broadcast"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids skewed shuffle)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:

      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "aqe"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (Adaptive Query Execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

21	  replicas: 1
22	  selector:
23	    matchLabels:
24	      app: spark-master
25	  template:
26	    metadata:
27	      labels:
28	        app: spark-master
29	        component: master
30	    spec:
31	      serviceAccountName: spark
32	      containers:
33	      - name: spark-master
34	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
35	        command:
36	        - /bin/bash

38	        - |
39	          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
40	          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh

file.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 7077
    name: spark
  - port: 8080
    name: webui
  selector:
    app: spark-master
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-master
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-master
        component: master
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-master
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        ports:
        - containerPort: 7077
          name: spark
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: webui
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-worker
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-worker
        component: worker
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-worker
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        env:
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY
          value: "1G"
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_CORES
          value: "1"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi

1. The current status of the baseline job
2. Wait for it to complete
3. Then apply the broadcast and AQE jobs

content.text: The YAML files look properly configured. Let me check the oracle to understand success criteria, then monitor the baseline until it completes.

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""Oracle for spark/spark_data_skew.
3	
4	Verifies the data-skew benchmark was fixed and at least one optimization ran:
5	  - the baseline job (spark-skew-baseline) completed successfully after the
6	    planted configuration bug was fixed, and
7	  - at least one optimization strategy job (broadcast or AQE) was applied and
8	    also completed successfully.
9	"""
10	from __future__ import annotations
11	
12	import sys
13	from pathlib import Path
14	
15	COMMON = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "common"
16	sys.path.insert(0, str(COMMON))
17	
18	from oracle_lib import bench_namespace, run  # noqa: E402
19	
20	NAMESPACE = bench_namespace("spark-skew")
21	BASELINE_JOB = "spark-skew-baseline"
22	OPTIMIZATION_JOBS = ("spark-skew-broadcast", "spark-skew-aqe")
23	
24	
25	def fail(message: str) -> int:
26	    print(f"spark_data_skew oracle failed: {message}")
27	    return 1
28	
29	
30	def job_exists(name: str) -> bool:
31	    proc = run(["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "get", "job", name], check=False)
32	    return proc.returncode == 0
33	
34	
35	def job_completed(name: str) -> bool:
36	    """True when the Job reports >= 1 succeeded completion."""
37	    proc = run(
38	        ["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "get", "job", name, "-o", "jsonpath={.status.succeeded}"],
39	        check=False,
40	    )
41	    if proc.returncode != 0:
42	        return False
43	    raw = (proc.stdout or "").strip()
44	    try:
45	        return int(raw or "0") >= 1
46	    except ValueError:
47	        return False
48	
49	
50	def main() -> int:
51	    if not job_exists(BASELINE_JOB):
52	        return fail(f"baseline job/{BASELINE_JOB} does not exist")
53	    if not job_completed(BASELINE_JOB):
54	        return fail(f"baseline job/{BASELINE_JOB} did not complete successfully")
55	
56	    applied = [name for name in OPTIMIZATION_JOBS if job_exists(name)]
57	    if not applied:
58	        return fail("no optimization strategy applied (expected broadcast or aqe job)")
59	
60	    completed = [name for name in applied if job_completed(name)]
61	    if not completed:
62	        return fail(
63	            f"optimization job(s) {applied} applied but none completed successfully"
64	        )
65	
66	    print(
67	        f"spark_data_skew verified: baseline + {', '.join(completed)} completed successfully"
68	    )
69	    return 0
70	
71	
72	if __name__ == "__main__":
73	    raise SystemExit(main())
74

input.command:
until kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "1"; do
  STATUS=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') Baseline still running: $STATUS"
  sleep 10
done
echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') Baseline job COMPLETED"

input.description: Apply broadcast and AQE optimization jobs

content.text: Both optimization jobs are now running. Let me poll until both complete.

input.command:
until kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "1" && \
      kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "1"; do
  BC=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load(sys.stdin); print('succ='+str(s.get('succeeded',0))+' act='+str(s.get('active',0)))" 2>/dev/null)
  AQ=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load(sys.stdin); print('succ='+str(s.get('succeeded',0))+' act='+str(s.get('active',0)))" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') broadcast[$BC] aqe[$AQ]"
  sleep 10
done
echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') Both optimization jobs COMPLETED"
input.description: Poll until both optimization jobs complete

content.text: All three jobs completed. Let me collect final results.

input.command:
echo "=== ALL JOBS ===" && kubectl get jobs -n spark-skew 2>&1
echo ""
echo "=== BASELINE (last 5 lines) ===" && kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=baseline --tail=5 2>&1
echo ""
echo "=== BROADCAST (last 5 lines) ===" && kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=broadcast --tail=5 2>&1
echo ""
echo "=== AQE (last 5 lines) ===" && kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=aqe --tail=5 2>&1
input.description: Collect final results from all three jobs
